summary: Iteration 23: AI Input Enter Key, Next Steps Labels, Home Active Events, Close Flow, Tip Recording - All PASS. Backend APIs and Frontend UI verified.

ai_input_manager_enter_newline.description: Manager Shift vs Ops AI input is a textarea. Enter creates newline, not sends message. Value verified: 'First line\nSecond line'

ai_input_owner_enter_newline.description: Owner AI Insights input is a textarea. Enter creates newline, not sends message. Value verified: 'First line\nSecond line'

ai_next_steps_no_category_labels_manager.description: Manager Next Steps shows numbered items (1, 2, 3...) without category labels (Revenue/Ops/Staff). Just 'Next Steps' header.

ai_next_steps_no_category_labels_owner.description: Owner Next Steps shows numbered items without category labels. Just 'Next Steps' header.

home_only_active_events.description: Home page shows only active events (5 events with 'Active' badges visible). Ended events filtered out.

home_single_click_preview.description: Single click on event shows preview panel with guest count, staff count, Manage button.

home_double_click_hint.description: 'Double-click to enter' hint present in event preview panel.

tap_close_flow_pay_here_button.description: Tap page shows 'Pay here' button (not Card/Cash/Comp) in unified close flow.

tap_close_flow_pay_register_button.description: Tap page shows 'Pay at register' button in unified close flow.

table_close_flow_pay_here_button.description: Table page shows 'Pay here' button in unified close flow for occupied tables.

table_close_flow_pay_register_button.description: Table page shows 'Pay at register' button in unified close flow.

backend_tap_session_close_payment_locati.description: POST /api/tap/session/{id}/close accepts payment_location parameter. Returns tip_pending: true for pay_here.

backend_tap_session_close_pay_at_registe.description: POST /api/tap/session/{id}/close with pay_at_register returns tip_pending: false.

backend_tap_record_tip_percentage.description: POST /api/tap/session/{id}/record-tip accepts tip_percent (20%) and returns distribution with proportional amounts.

backend_tap_record_tip_custom_amount.description: POST /api/tap/session/{id}/record-tip accepts tip_amount ($10) and calculates percentage, returns distribution.

backend_tap_closed_sessions.description: GET /api/tap/sessions/closed?venue_id=X returns closed sessions with tip status.

backend_table_close_payment_location.description: POST /api/table/close accepts payment_location parameter. Returns tip_pending: true for pay_here.

tap_sessions: Created and closed multiple test sessions for tip recording

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 features verified: (1) AI Input uses textarea, Enter key creates newline not sends - verified in both Manager (Shift vs Ops) and Owner (AI Insights). (2) Next Steps show numbered items without category labels. (3) Home shows only active events with preview panel on single click (guest/staff count, Manage button, double-click hint). (4) Unified close flow on Tap and Table pages shows 'Pay here' / 'Pay at register' buttons. (5) Backend tip recording fully working: close with pay_here triggers tip_pending, record-tip accepts percentage or custom amount and distributes proportionally.
